Video.summary: Meredith McCord arrives in late spring and joins Capt. Justin Leake on the hunt for a fish she’s never caught before. Lo and behold, it’s a day fit for a king.
Video.title: "First Things First"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Tour!!"

Video.summary: The positive impact made by the shooting sports and recreational shooting to people across our country can’t be measured in just one story, so we have three. In Florida, Olympian Dania Vizzi trains at her home shooting facility and talk about how she went from ballerina to one of the best shotgun shooters in the world. In Nebraska, firearms instructor Thea Van Syoc has used the disciplines of competitive pistol shooting and training to help shape her life. Finally we’ll take a look into the National African American Gun Association and learn how one day at the range for Phillip Smith created the fastest growing firearm organization in the United States.
Video.title: “Shooting is Life”

Video.summary: After several years of shifting focus back to his native whitetails, Dahlke returns to mule deer country with the Muley Freak, Erik Van Woerkom. Follow along on this Utah mule deer hunt.
Video.title: "The Muley Freak"

Video.summary: CA and Trevor field test some new Flats Class Exclusive Rods.
Video.title: "Two-Timing Trevor"

Video.summary: CA heads to the northern regions of the Nature Coast for a multi-species day.
Video.title: "Pressure Makes Diamonds"

Video.summary: Captains Jonathan Moss and Josh Greer are fishing for south Florida’s exotics amongst the alligators of the Florida Everglades.
Video.title: "Alligator Alley"

Video.summary: We’re headed to the Midwest for a December waterfowl grind. First stop: Kansas, chasing ducks with the crew from Dirty’s Outerwear. Then Cole Barthel jumps south to Oklahoma to squeeze in one more hunt before Christmas break.
Video.title: "Covered Up In Ducks"

Video.summary: This week we are rolling along side the crew from Double T Outfitters. Management plays a huge role in every outfitters success every year. Bret and his team have a strong management plan in place and these guys had a blast with a group of out of state hunters.
Video.title: "Double T Outfitters"

Video.summary: With Meredith McCord halfway around the world, Capt. Justin Leake gives show producer Chris Hermans his first shot at landing a tarpon after filming them for 9 seasons. Does art imitate life?
Video.title: "Tarpon Producer"

Video.summary: Explore Pakistan's wilderness with Dan Cabela as he treks the rugged mountains, in search of ibex and urial, and learns about the community conservation model that has protected these species.
Video.title: "Community Conservation in Pakistan"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Rich's son Reed, who takes the wheel and directs the team into some amazing early morning baby tarpon fishing in the Everglades.
Video.title: "Baby Tarpon With Captain Reed"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take Hunter Smallback into the Everglades for some snook fishing, and the action really heats up when some hungry Lemon sharks crash the party.
Video.title: "Combat Fishing With Hunter Smallback"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor catch two thirds of a slam when they bring Tom’s new Yellowfin 24’ Bay up to Key Largo for some exciting flats fishing.
Video.title: "Two Out Of Three Ain't Bad"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Captain Mason Baker to sample some early morning Islamorada backcountry baby tarpon action.
Video.title: "Baby Tarpon With Mason Baker"

Video.summary: After a successful morning of baby tarpon fishing, Captains Tom Rowland, Rich Tudor and Mason Baker slide over to the legendary downtown Islamorada flats to check on the resurgence of Florida Keys bonefish.
Video.title: "Islamorada Bonefish With Mason Baker"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head into the Everglades backcountry out of Key Largo to fish the shallow grass flats for tailing redfish.
Video.title: "Everglades Redfish Out Of Key Largo"

Video.summary: We explore the sophisticated world of the whitetail deer's senses, exploring how these remarkable creatures have evolved to pattern hunters through their keen sense of smell and heightened sensory awareness.
Video.title: "Patterning Hunters"

Video.summary: Jennifer Brooks has spent her life answering the call to serve. From flying Blackhawk helicopters on multiple combat missions during two tours in Iraq to now serving as an Air Medical Pilot and first responder, her story is one of courage, sacrifice, and humility. In this episode of Storytellers, we join Jennifer in the field for a hunt that offers a rare moment to slow down, reflect, and honor a life dedicated to protecting others.
Video.title: "Bucks for the Brave: Women's Hunt"

Video.summary: Spring Thunder heads North to turkey hunt New York State. Realtree video producer Matt Garger grew up turkey hunting New York State, but with limited ground to hunt, the guys hit a mix of public and permission ground to find gobblers. Using their OnX maps to secure turkey hunting ground, the guys are able to double up on two New York Longbeards!!
Video.title: "New York Turkey Hunting | Permission Ground Gobblers | "

Image.alt: "New York Turkey Hunting | Permission Ground Gobblers | "
"New York Turkey Hunting | Permission Ground Gobblers | "
"New York Turkey Hunting | Permission Ground Gobblers | "

Video.summary: Phillip Culpepper heads westward to Alabama to learn more about Turkeys for Tomorrow (TFT) and its mission. This education organization is all about sharing information and helping to grow the turkey population. TFT promotes America's hunting traditions, conservation, and education through the timeless collaboration of hunters and wildlife professionals to ensure we all have turkeys for tomorrow.
Video.title: "Are Turkey Population Numbers Declining? | Turkeys For Tomorrow"

Image.alt: "Are Turkey Population Numbers Declining? | Turkeys For Tomorrow"
"Are Turkey Population Numbers Declining? | Turkeys For Tomorrow"
"Are Turkey Population Numbers Declining? | Turkeys For Tomorrow"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.
Video.title: Wildbound - "New Zealand"

Video.summary: Skyler & Clayton kicked off their 2024 Kansas Turkey Season and it ended almost as quick as it started. Both of them tagged out in a hurry within the first few hunts. Some of the best 24 hours of turkey hunting they've ever experienced!
Video.title: "Back to Back"

Video.summary: Willi got an invitation on a late season whitetail hunt in Oklahoma. He joins Tom Petry for a rifle hunt on a property he has no history with, but it did have some good deer and lots of wild horses.
Video.title: "Okie Horse Pasture Buck"

Video.summary: A massive heavy old buck disappears and re-appears leaving many questions and a year of trying to get an encounter.
Video.title: s - "Gutshot"

Video.summary: Hunting has a way of grounding us, reminding us of what truly matters: shared moments and unforgettable memories. Chance and Ashleigh Eckert are on their first out-of-state hunt in the rolling hills of Ohio. After overcoming a life-changing kidney transplant, their story is one of faith, love, and resilience. While the goal was a big buck, the true reward was the time spent together and the lessons learned along the way. Because hunting is about so much more than the harvest — it’s about the journey.
Video.title: "Second Chance | Hunting the November Rut in Ohio"

Image.alt: "Second Chance | Hunting the November Rut in Ohio"
"Second Chance | Hunting the November Rut in Ohio"
"Second Chance | Hunting the November Rut in Ohio"

Video.summary: Mike Hunsucker of Heartland Bowhunter returns to a familiar ranch he’s helped manage for years, chasing a legendary buck nicknamed “Buddy.”
Video.title: "The Final Day Chase for “Buddy”"

Video.summary: Jerry and Austin are hunting turkey on their home turf in Pennsylvania where they are later joined by the Sharp brothers and David "Bunch" Hale in hopes of truly having a season to remember!
Video.title: "Got Turkey"

Video.summary: Human encroachment and pressure from poaching are the greatest threats to wildlife in Africa. Dan Cabela has traveled to Tanzania to see how Robin Hurt safaris manages two large conservation areas in the face of these daily challenges.
Video.title: "Anti-poaching in Tanzania"

Video.summary: Cole Barthel is back home hunting with family and friends in the Louisiana Timber.
Video.title: "LA Timber"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike navigates South Carolina’s breathtaking marsh, seizing a brief window when the seasonal high tide floods the grass, bringing incredible fishing.
Video.title: "Flood Tide"

Video.summary: Locate and catch more suspended crappies during mid-winter conditions.
Video.title: "Suspended Crappies"

Video.summary: Captain Josh and the fam head out to do some surf fishing to see what’s biting. Then ended the day building professional sand castles and playing goofy golf.
Video.title: "Family Fun"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob and Capt. Greg Dini explore Greg’s career and Florida Bay.
Video.title: "Who Dini"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob travels down to Casa Blanca Fly Fishing Lodge on a quest to catch multiple species fishing the legendary waters of Ascension Bay, Mexico.
Video.title: "Casa Blanca"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor join Captain Bryson Shaaber to fish the channels around Key West targeting big spring tarpon with live pinfish.
Video.title: "Tarpon in the Key West Channels"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor launch out of Key Largo and fish their way up a creek filled with monsters.
Video.title: "Creek Monsters"

Video.summary: When Blair heads down to Louisiana to fish, it's usually with Capt. Mike Frenette and it's usually for big redfish.
Video.title: s - "Big Bruisers"

Video.summary: In this episode, Capt. Jason Dozier teams up with Capt. Griffin Deans to chase the elusive Hogfish. With the Hogfish proving elusive, they manage to turn the day into a success, filling the box with an impressive haul and reeling in a few massive catches along the way.
Video.title: "The Nearshore Bend"

Video.summary: The Local Knowledge crew heads to Catalina Island off the coast of Southern California to participate in the 2024 War Heroes On Water tournament. This event offers a unique opportunity for the sport fishing community to create meaningful connections with our nation's heroes while raising awareness of the challenges they sometimes face when transitioning back to civilian life. With a little bit of luck and a lot of teamwork, Ali and Rush hope to put their veterans on a Bluefin tuna bite they won't forget!
Video.title: "War Heroes On Water"

Video.summary: Rush takes up an invite from good friend and fellow guide Jared Cyr to sight fish for barracuda and bonefish in the shallow waters of the Florida Keys. Meanwhile Rush's boat takes a break from charter fishing to get a new Seakeeper RIDE system installed.
Video.title: "Flats Ride"

Video.summary: After a great trip fishing the flats, Rush returns the favor and extends an invite to friend Jarred Cyr fishing offshore. Fishing in Key West is all about the variety of species and opportunities they present. Mixing it up and taking advantage of this, the guys decide to see how many species they can catch using light spin and fly tackle offshore.
Video.title: "Trading Trips"

Video.summary: The LK crew returns to Guatemala with more friends for our yearly dose of world class fishing! Year after year, Casa Vieja Lodge continues to impress with daily shots at sailfish, marlin, mahi, and tuna. Tag along on our 2nd annual group trip for a tropical fishing experience like no other!
Video.title: "Return to Casa Vieja Lodge"

Video.summary: The Boss Hen, Jill Slocumb, from Realtree hunts for her first Turkey in years with Phillip Culpepper in Tennessee!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Boss HEN | Turkey Hunting Tennessee w/ Phillip Culpepper | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "Boss HEN | Turkey Hunting Tennessee w/ Phillip Culpepper | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Boss HEN | Turkey Hunting Tennessee w/ Phillip Culpepper | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Boss HEN | Turkey Hunting Tennessee w/ Phillip Culpepper | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: The Black Cloud crew heads to the timber of Arkansas to hunt with good friends in an old blind that’s seen many unbelievable hunts throughout the years.
Video.title: "Hunting with Old Friends | "

Video.summary: In this episode, we chase the hardheaded turkeys of Southwest Mississippi. We've got a strand of bad weather coming, and a lot to catch up on in Real Estate so it's going to be our last hunt for awhile. We get set up on these two gobblers we've been following all year and then a surprise bird comes out of nowhere (Randy Orton Style). You will not want to miss this episode!
Video.title: "Tagged Out In Mississippi"+

Video.summary: Willi heads back to Ohio to hunt a lease with good friends, Nick, Tom and Jason. He had a unique hunt the previous year on a golf course. They didn’t lease the golf course this year, but it was the same group hunting a familiar piece of property.
Video.title: "Stickers In Ohio"

Video.summary: The Savage 110 Ultralite Elite is a lightweight, compact rifle that's ideal for backcountry hunters. This rifle cuts weight with features such as a Proof Research carbon-fiber wrapped stainless-steel barrel and MDT HNT26 folding carbon-fiber stock.
Video.title: HuntStand Tips & Gear - "Introducing the Savage Ultralite Elite Rifle"

Image.alt: HuntStand Tips & Gear - "Introducing the Savage Ultralite Elite Rifle"
HuntStand Tips & Gear - "Introducing the Savage Ultralite Elite Rifle"
HuntStand Tips & Gear - "Introducing the Savage Ultralite Elite Rifle"
